note: Base fallback config. Ban co the de yen file nay de tranh sua nham.
Hay uu tien chinh configs/editable_roi.json de tinh ROI/line an toan hon.
ROI is a polygon [[x1,y1], ...] covering the lower part of the main road where vehicles are close to camera.
To move counting line up/down: change the Y value of 'start' and 'end' (both should have similar Y).
To make ROI wider/narrower: adjust the X coordinates; to move ROI up/down: adjust the Y coordinates.
Tip: open a frame in an image viewer, hover mouse to read (x,y), then update this file and rerun.
